title: New Entitlement to Statutory Neonatal Care Pay
body: "HMRC carry out equality impact assessments as an important part of our framework to ensure that projects and schemes do not unlawfully discriminate against those customers with protected characteristics.  HMRC completed this equality impact assessment to demonstrate that equality considerations are key in decision-making processes. "

taxons.title: Holidays, time off, sick leave, maternity and paternity leave
